title: Automation for users management

posts.author: Surabhi (Surabhi Valiyatile)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to link the users table on the administration page to a board for user management? Specifically, can we ensure that the board updates whenever a user role is changed, a user account is removed, or a new user account is created? Can this be achieved through a workflow or automation?
